seo.title: DeComplex Platform - Full-Stack Architecture Showcase (Web, Mobile, Admin, Backend)
seo.description: DeComplex is a public full-stack showcase platform built to demonstrate real engineering skills and architecture. Since prior commercial work is under NDA, this platform provides a transparent, production-style reference across web, admin, React Native mobile, and a scalable backend.

hero.title: Platform Overview
hero.description: DeComplex is a modular, production-grade platform created to demonstrate end-to-end system architecture, scalable service design, and real-world engineering practices. It serves as a unified showcase of web, mobile, backend, and infrastructure components working together as a cohesive system.

webApp.title: Web App
webApp.description: Public-facing web interface for browsing job vacancies, authenticating users, and submitting applications with resumes and cover letters.

adminConsole.title: Admin Console
adminConsole.description: Administrative interface for companies to manage users, roles, job vacancies, and candidate applications.

mobileSdk.title: Mobile App
mobileSdk.description: React Native application built with Expo, mirroring Web App behavior and available as web and Android builds.

backendServices.title: Backend Services
backendServices.description: REST API handling authentication, business logic, data persistence, and integrations across all client applications.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Containerized deployment, CI pipelines, automated testing, and operational workflows across the full platform lifecycle.

page.title: Web App
page.description: User-facing web interface that allows candidates to browse job vacancies publicly, authenticate to access detailed vacancy information, and submit applications with cover letters and resumes. Supports multilingual content and session-based authentication.

vacancyBrowsing.title: Vacancy Browsing
vacancyBrowsing.description: Public access to job listings with basic vacancy information available without authentication.

authenticationFlow.title: Authentication Flow
authenticationFlow.description: User registration and login are required to access detailed vacancy information and apply for positions.

vacancyDetails.title: Vacancy Details
vacancyDetails.description: Detailed vacancy pages available to authenticated users, including full job descriptions and requirements.

applicationSubmission.title: Application Submission
applicationSubmission.description: Ability to submit job applications with a cover letter and attached resume directly through the platform.

componentBased.title: Component-based architecture
componentBased.description: - Modular UI components with clear separation of concerns and reusable patterns.

authAndProtectedAccess.title: Authentication and protected access
authAndProtectedAccess.description: - Vacancy browsing is public, while vacancy details and application submission require authentication.

localizationTheming.title: Localization and theming
localizationTheming.description: - Internationalization via next-intl and theme switching via next-themes.

centralizedApi.title: API integration
centralizedApi.description: - Consistent request handling and error mapping across UI flows.

testingCoverage.title: Testing coverage
testingCoverage.description: - Unit, integration, and end-to-end tests cover critical user flows (auth, vacancy details, application submission).

deployment.title: How to Run
deployment.description: Switch between local, Docker, demo, and production workflows to see how the web application is developed, previewed, and released.

local.label: Local
local.description: Run the web application locally through the standard development server workflow.

docker.label: Docker
docker.description: Start the web application through containerized services and runtime dependencies.

demo.label: Demo
demo.description: Run a preview-oriented deployment flow for demo and validation environments.

production.label: Production
production.description: Use the release workflow to build and deploy the production web target.

page.title: Admin Console
page.description: Administrative interface for companies to manage users, roles, job vacancies, and candidate applications. Supports role-based access for company admins and recruiters.

roleManagement.title: Role-Based Access
roleManagement.description: Separation of permissions between company admins and recruiters with predefined permissions.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: Creation and management of company users, including admins and recruiters.

vacancyManagement.title: Vacancy Management
vacancyManagement.description: Creation, editing, and publishing of job vacancies by authorized users.

applicationReview.title: Application Review
applicationReview.description: Review of candidate applications, including access to submitted resumes and cover letters.

roleSeparation.title: Role separation
roleSeparation.description: - Clear separation of permissions between company admins and recruiters.

centralizedApi.title: API integration
centralizedApi.description: - Centralized API communication for managing users, vacancies, and applications.

testingCoverage.title: Testing coverage
testingCoverage.description: - Unit, integration, and end-to-end tests cover core admin flows.

deployment.title: How to Run
deployment.description: Switch between local, Docker, demo, and production workflows to see how the admin panel is started, previewed, and delivered.

local.label: Local
local.description: Run the admin panel locally with the standard Vite development workflow.

docker.label: Docker
docker.description: Launch the admin panel through its containerized build and runtime pipeline.

demo.label: Demo
demo.description: Use the demo deployment flow for preview dashboards and validation environments.

production.label: Production
production.description: Use the release workflow to prepare and deploy the production admin target.

page.title: Mobile App
page.description: Cross-platform application built with React Native and Expo. Available as a web build and as an Android APK. iOS is supported for development and testing via Expo Go (QR), without App Store distribution. Mirrors the Web App flow for browsing vacancies, authentication, and submitting applications with cover letters and resume uploads.

vacancyBrowsing.title: Vacancy browsing
vacancyBrowsing.description: Public access to vacancy listings, with authentication required for detailed views and application submission.

authenticationFlow.title: Authentication flow
authenticationFlow.description: Registration and login using token-based sessions to access protected actions.

applicationSubmission.title: Application submission
applicationSubmission.description: Submit job applications with a cover letter and attach a resume via the document picker.

localSessionStorage.title: Local session storage
localSessionStorage.description: Persist device fingerprint and authentication tokens using AsyncStorage, with secure storage for sensitive values.

expoCrossPlatform.title: Expo cross-platform delivery
expoCrossPlatform.description: - Single codebase delivered as a web build and as native Android, with iOS supported for dev/testing via Expo Go.

stateAndApi.title: State management and data fetching
stateAndApi.description: - Redux Toolkit with RTK Query for server communication and API request lifecycle management.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: - Multilingual UI powered by i18next with device locale detection.

testingCoverage.title: Testing coverage
testingCoverage.description: - Jest-based unit and integration tests, along with Playwright end-to-end tests for the web export.

deployment.title: How to Run
deployment.description: Switch between local, Docker, demo, and production workflows to see how the mobile module can be started, previewed, or released.

local.label: Local
local.description: Run the mobile application directly through the local Expo development workflow.

docker.label: Docker
docker.description: Boot the mobile-related services through containerized infrastructure and shared dependencies.

demo.label: Demo
demo.description: Run the demo-oriented mobile flow for preview environments and distributable builds.

production.label: Production
production.description: Use the production release workflow to prepare and deploy the mobile target for final environments.

page.title: Backend Services
page.description: Backend API that powers the DeComplex platform. Provides REST endpoints, authentication, business logic, and integrations used by the Web App, Admin Console, and Mobile App.

restApi.title: REST API
restApi.description: Express-based REST endpoints with a clear routing structure and consistent request-response handling.

auth.title: Authentication & Authorization
auth.description: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control for companies, admins, and recruiters.

databaseMigrations.title: PostgreSQL + Migrations
databaseMigrations.description: Sequelize models with migrations and seeders for reproducible environments and stable schema evolution.

integrationsDocs.title: Integrations & API Docs
integrationsDocs.description: Redis for caching and auxiliary storage, optional RabbitMQ for asynchronous tasks, and Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for API endpoints.

modularApi.title: Modular API design
modularApi.description: - Feature-oriented modules with isolated routing layers, validation, and service logic.

dataAccess.title: Data access layer
dataAccess.description: - Sequelize-based persistence with explicit migrations and well-defined query patterns.

operability.title: Security and observability
operability.description: - Helmet, CORS configuration, validation (Joi), and structured logging (Pino) for secure and traceable operations.

deployment.title: How to Run
deployment.description: Switch between local, Docker, demo, and production workflows to see how backend services and their dependencies are started and deployed.

local.label: Local
local.description: Run backend services locally with migrations and the development server workflow.

docker.label: Docker
docker.description: Start backend services and shared runtime dependencies through containers.

demo.label: Demo
demo.description: Use the demo deployment flow for backend preview and validation environments.

production.label: Production
production.description: Use the release workflow to build, validate, and deploy production backend services.

header.title: Infrastructure
header.lead: Containerized runtime and CI/CD workflows for the DeComplex platform. Covers service isolation, reverse proxy and load balancing, test environments, and production packaging.

containerizedServices.title: Containerized Services
containerizedServices.description: All components run in isolated Docker containers, including the Web App, Admin Console, Mobile App, Backend API, PostgreSQL, Redis, and RabbitMQ.

reverseProxyAndLb.title: Reverse Proxy & Load Balancing
reverseProxyAndLb.description: An Nginx-based entry point routes traffic to internal services and can distribute requests across multiple backend instances.

e2eTestEnvironments.title: E2E Test Environments
e2eTestEnvironments.description: Dedicated E2E Docker Compose environments spin up test containers, validate critical flows (including load-balancing behavior), and are torn down after completion.

automatedDelivery.title: Automated Delivery
automatedDelivery.description: CI pipelines build the services, run unit, integration, and E2E test suites, and produce production images after successful verification.

envSecrets.title: Environment and secrets management
envSecrets.description: Environment-specific configuration via .env files, with separate settings for local, testing, and E2E environments.

rbac.title: Role-based access control
rbac.description: Role separation across the platform (company admins, recruiters, and candidates) enforced by backend authorization.

containerIsolation.title: Container isolation
containerIsolation.description: Services run in isolated Docker containers with controlled networking and reproducible runtime behavior.

testGates.title: Test gates in CI
testGates.description: Unit, integration, and end-to-end tests act as quality gates before producing production images.

deployment.title: How to Run
deployment.description: Switch between local, Docker, demo, and production workflows to see how infrastructure layers and shared platform services are provisioned.

local.label: Local
local.description: Bring up the core infrastructure stack locally for development and internal validation.

docker.label: Docker
docker.description: Provision infrastructure services through containerized images and runtime orchestration.

demo.label: Demo
demo.description: Use the demo flow for preview infrastructure environments and integration validation.

production.label: Production
production.description: Use the production workflow to validate and provision the final infrastructure stack.
